_instructions.purpose: Avoid reading source files before knowing their shape. Query this index first for any file you intend to modify or depend on. Only open the actual source file when you need exact line content for fsReplace or when the entry is marked stale.
workflow: 1. Check this index for the target file's state, props, api_calls, and key_logic.
2. If stale=true or last_modified is older than recent-changes.md entries, re-read the source file and update this entry.
3. Only read source files when: (a) making an fsReplace edit, (b) the entry is stale, (c) the file is not yet indexed.
4. After modifying any file, update its entry here — state, key_logic, last_modified, stale=false.
_instructions.staleness_rule: Mark stale=true whenever recent-changes.md lists that file as modified and this index has not been updated to reflect it.

timers: 60s tick: force re-render for isUpcoming expiry
client/src/pages/patient/PatientDashboar.key_logic: isUpcoming filters status===confirmed AND new Date(date+T+endTime) > now. spotlightAppt = upcomingAppts[0]. Recent activity shows appointments.slice(0,3) regardless of status.

client/src/pages/patient/PatientAppointm.key_logic: canCancel = status===confirmed && date >= todayStr. getFilteredAppointments() filters by activeTab. ongoingEligible = confirmed+future, completedEligible = completed+!reviewSubmitted.

api_calls: getMyAppointments — fetches all, finds by id match
client/src/pages/patient/AppointmentDeta.key_logic: Fetches all appointments and finds by _id. No dedicated single-appointment endpoint used.

store: useAuthStore: user, setCredentials, token — avatar sync on upload
client/src/pages/patient/PatientProfile..key_logic: Draft stored in localStorage under DRAFT_KEY. isTabDirty() compares formData vs savedData. completedSteps computed from profile fields. Avatar upload syncs to authStore via setCredentials.
renders: 5 tab components (BasicInfoTab, MedicalHistoryTab, LifestyleTab, EmergencyContactsTab, InsuranceTab)

client/src/pages/patient/PatientPayments.key_logic: getRefundState(payment) → none|requested|pending|approved|rejected|processed. downloadReceipt() generates jsPDF. totalSpent = sum of payment.amount.
renders: payments table with refund state badges
reviews list with star ratings, doctor name, appointment date

client/src/pages/patient/BookingSuccessP.key_logic: Matches payment by p.appointment===id or p.appointment._id===id. handlePrint() generates jsPDF receipt.

api_calls: getWeeklyScheduleAPI — all via Promise.all on mount, 15s poll
client/src/pages/doctor/DoctorDashboard..key_logic: todayAppts = appointments where date===todayStr. thisMonthEarnings sums doctorEarnings for paid appointments in current YYYY-MM. uniquePatients via Set. recentBookings = last 5 by date.

client/src/pages/doctor/DoctorAppointmen.key_logic: getFilteredAppointments filters by activeTab + fromDate/toDate range. toggleRowExpansion manages expanded row. DoctorCancellationModal used for new cancel flow.
renders: tab bar with date range filter
session notes upload/remove in expanded row

client/src/pages/doctor/DoctorAvailabili.key_logic: DEFAULT_SCHEDULE built from DAYS array. copyToAllDays(sourceKey) clones one day's times to all enabled days. today computed as YYYY-MM-DD to prevent past date blocking.

client/src/pages/doctor/DoctorProfileEdi.key_logic: Draft stored in localStorage under DRAFT_KEY. SPECIALIZATION_OPTIONS array used for dropdown. selectedSpecs derived by splitting specializationText. Steps differ between verified/unverified via DOCTOR_STEPS_VERIFIED vs DOCTOR_STEPS_UNVERIFIED.

client/src/pages/doctor/DoctorEarnings.j.key_logic: completedPaid = completed + (paid|refunded). monthlyMap groups earnings by YYYY-MM. diffEarnings compares currentMonth vs prevMonth. paginatedPayments = sorted desc, sliced by limit=10.

client/src/pages/doctor/MyReviews.jsx.key_logic: ratingCounts{5:0..1:0} tallied from reviews. avgRating computed. getTreatedSpecialization() returns first spec or General.

api_calls: getOverviewAPI, getRevenueSeriesAPI, getAppointmentBreakdownAPI, getRecentActivityAPI — Promise.all on mount
getRevenueSeriesAPI, getTopDoctorsAPI, getSpecializationsAPI — Promise.all on mount
verifyDoctorAPI, rejectDoctorAPI, suspendDoctorAPI, reconsiderDoctorAPI — on actions
client/src/pages/admin/AdminDoctorVerifi.key_logic: fetchDirectory uses useCallback, debounced search (300ms). LIMIT=10. Pending queue has separate state from directory.
renders: pending queue table with expand/verify/reject actions
directory table with pagination and search

api_calls: getAllAppointments(page, LIMIT=10) — on mount + page change, 30s poll
client/src/pages/admin/AdminBookings.jsx.key_logic: Client-side statusFilter applied to fetched page. pageTotals computed from filtered set. AppointmentMediaViewer embedded in expandedRow.

client/src/pages/admin/AdminUsers.jsx.key_logic: LIMIT=15. useCallback fetch. Search/filter params passed to API (server-side filtering).

client/src/pages/admin/AdminRefunds.jsx.key_logic: expandedRefund tracks which refund is open for action. Reject requires noteInput. formatDate + formatTime helpers. getPatientInitials for avatar fallback.
renders: refund queue list with patient avatar/profileImage

client/src/pages/admin/AdminReviews.jsx.key_logic: Shell component — delegates entirely to ReviewsTable component.

client/src/pages/admin/AdminRevenue.jsx.key_logic: handleRevenueAggregates callback passed to PaymentsTable to receive aggregated totals. Shell + metrics.

client/src/pages/public/DoctorListingPag.key_logic: currentFilters derived from searchParams (q, specialization, minRating, nearby, lat, lng). mapSpecialization() normalises URL param to DB value.

renders: doctor profile header with bordered profile photo

state: showForgotPassword — main form; ForgotPasswordPanel has own state: step, email, resetToken, tokenInput, newPassword, confirmPassword, loading, error, copied
client/src/pages/public/LoginPage.jsx.key_logic: DEMO_ACCOUNTS array shown for quick fill. DASHBOARD_ROUTES maps role to redirect path.

client/src/components/booking/SlotPicker.key_logic: generateDefaultAvailability() creates mock slots for UI fallback. showModalRef prevents modal auto-close during background polling. Two-step: book slot → show BookingConfirmationModal → initiatePayment.

client/src/components/booking/BookingCon.key_logic: Step 1 = confirm details + media upload. Step 2 = proceed to payment. Media fetched when appointmentId changes. handleBook() calls onConfirm().

client/src/components/booking/MediaUploa.key_logic: MAX_FILES=5, MAX_FILE_SIZE=25MB. ALLOWED_TYPES: images, video, audio. Drag-and-drop + click upload.

client/src/components/appointments/Appoi.key_logic: Lightbox for images, inline HTML5 player for video/audio. uploadedBy==='patient' shows patient badge.

client/src/components/appointments/Patie.key_logic: canCancel = confirmed && date > todayString. canReview = completed && !reviewDone. handleReviewSuccess sets reviewDone=true.

client/src/components/appointments/Docto.key_logic: Inline document upload/delete via axiosInstance. isConfirmed = status===confirmed.
Displays patient name with last initial. Wraps CancellationModal styles.

api_calls: getDoctorProfileAPI, getDoctorAppointments — doctor role only, 15s poll
client/src/components/layout/DashboardLa.key_logic: patientNavigation vs doctorNavigation determined by user.role. verificationStatus polling triggers modal on first verified transition. pendingCount = active confirmed future appts for doctor badge.

client/src/components/layout/AdminLayout.key_logic: 3 nav groups: monitorGroup, manageGroup, financeGroup. Badges on verification and refunds nav items.

client/src/components/layout/Navbar.jsx.key_logic: getLogoRedirectPath() returns role-based home. publicLinks vs roleLinks[user.role]. Outside click listener closes dropdown.

client/src/components/layout/Notificatio.key_logic: CATEGORY_MAP maps notification type to label/icon. Token check before API call. formatTimeAgo() for relative timestamps.

client/src/components/common/Badge.jsx.key_logic: VARIANT_CONFIG maps variant to label+colors. Interactive if onRemove or onClick present.

client/src/components/common/Button.jsx.key_logic: VARIANT_CLASSES and SIZE_CLASSES lookup. Loading shows spinner but not visually disabled. filteredSizeClass skips size height if className has h-.

client/src/components/common/Modal.jsx.key_logic: Focus trap on open. Escape key closes. Body overflow locked. Overlay click closes if closeOnOverlay=true.

client/src/components/common/Table.jsx.key_logic: ActionLink: destructive=true applies red color. Sortable column headers via ChevronUp/Down.

client/src/components/doctor/DoctorCard..key_logic: toTitleCase, getInitials, getCityFromAddress helpers. Stagger animation delay = min(index,7)*60ms. Renders profileImage if available, else initials circle. navigate to /doctors/:id on click.

client/src/store/authStore.js.persistence: localStorage keys: theralign_token, theralign_user. Hydrated synchronously at store creation to avoid race conditions.

client/src/routes/AppRoutes.jsx.key_logic: All pages lazy-loaded. ProtectedRoute wraps auth check. RoleRoute wraps role check. HomeRedirect sends to role-based dashboard on /. Layouts: PublicLayout, DashboardLayout (patient+doctor), AdminLayout.

client_api_layer._note: All functions use axiosInstance. Base URL set via VITE_API_URL. Token attached via request interceptor from localStorage.

client/src/api/axiosInstance.js.key_logic: Request interceptor attaches Authorization: Bearer <token> from localStorage. Response interceptor handles 401 by clearing credentials.

server/src/models/User.model.js.fields: name(String,req), email(String,req,unique), passwordHash(String,req), role(patient|doctor|admin,default:patient), profileImage(String,null), phone(String,null), isActive(Boolean,true), resetPasswordToken(String,null), resetPasswordExpires(Date,null)
hooks: pre-save: bcrypt hash if password modified

server/src/models/DoctorProfile.model.js.fields: user(ObjectId→User,req), specialization([String]), yearsOfExperience(Number), clinicName(String), clinicAddress(String), city(String), clinicLocation{type:'Point',coordinates:[lng,lat]}, consultationFee(Number,default:500), bio(String), registrationNumber(String), degreeDocument(String/URL), licenseDocument(String/URL), isOnboarded(Boolean,false), verificationStatus(pending|verified|rejected|suspended,default:pending), rejectionReason(String,null), suspensionReason(String,null), totalEarnings(Number,0), totalAppointments(Number,0), averageRating(Number,0), completedSteps([String]), languages([String]), isAvailable(Boolean,true), profileImage(String,null), aiSummary(String,null)
constraints: All required fields gated by isOnboarded===true conditional

server/src/models/PatientProfile.model.j.fields: user(ObjectId→User,req), dob(Date), address(String), gender(male|female|other|prefer_not_to_say), height(Number), weight(Number), medicalHistory{conditions:[{conditionName,year,notes}], allergies:[String], surgeries:[{surgeryName,year,description}]}, lifestyle{smokingStatus(String), activityLevel(String), alcoholUse(Boolean), dietaryRestrictions(Boolean)}, emergencyContacts:[{name,relationship,phone}], insurance{provider,policyNumber}, completedSteps([Number])

server/src/models/Appointment.model.js.fields: patient(ObjectId→User,req), doctor(ObjectId→DoctorProfile,req), slot(ObjectId→AvailabilitySlot,null), date(String YYYY-MM-DD,req), startTime(String HH:mm,req), endTime(String HH:mm,req), status(pending|confirmed|completed|cancelled,default:confirmed), consultationFee(Number,req), platformCommission(Number,req), doctorEarnings(Number,req), paymentStatus(unpaid|paid|refunded,default:unpaid), paymentId(String,null), patientNotes(String,max500), cancellationReason(String), cancelledBy(patient|doctor|admin|system|''), reviewSubmitted(Boolean,false), sessionDocument{url,publicId,uploadedAt,fileName}
server/src/models/Appointment.model.js.critical: ADR-004: consultationFee/platformCommission/doctorEarnings are immutable snapshots. Never recalculate.

server/src/models/AvailabilitySlot.model.fields: doctor(ObjectId→DoctorProfile,req), date(String YYYY-MM-DD,req), startTime(String HH:mm,req), endTime(String HH:mm,req), isBooked(Boolean,false), isActive(Boolean,true)

server/src/models/WeeklySchedule.model.j.fields: doctor(ObjectId→DoctorProfile,req,unique), schedule{monday-sunday:{enabled,startTime,endTime}}, slotDuration(30|45|60,default:30), breakEnabled(Boolean), breakStartTime(String), breakEndTime(String), blockedDates([String YYYY-MM-DD]), timezone(String,Asia/Kolkata)

server/src/models/Payment.model.js.fields: appointment(ObjectId→Appointment,req), patient(ObjectId→User,req), doctor(ObjectId→DoctorProfile,req), razorpayOrderId(String,req), razorpayPaymentId(String,null), razorpaySignature(String,null), amount(Number,req — rupees), currency(String,INR), status(created|paid|failed|refunded,default:created), platformCommission(Number,req), doctorEarnings(Number,req), refundStatus(none|requested|pending|approved|rejected|processed,default:none), refundReason(String), refundId(String,null), refundAdminNote(String), adminNote(String), refundAmount(Number,null), refundedBy(patient|doctor|admin|null), refundRequestedAt(Date,null), refundProcessedAt(Date,null), refundResolvedAt(Date,null)
server/src/models/Payment.model.js.critical: ADR-006: DB stores rupees. Multiply by 100 for Razorpay API. ADR-009: Verify HMAC-SHA256 before any status change.

hooks: post-save: recalculates DoctorProfile.averageRating and totalReviews via aggregate

server/src/models/Notification.model.js.fields: recipient(ObjectId→User,req), type(booking_confirmed|appointment_cancelled|payment_received|refund_processed|review_received|document_uploaded|media_uploaded|system,req), title(String,req), message(String,req), link(String,null), isRead(Boolean,false), relatedEntity(ObjectId,null)

server/src/models/AppointmentMedia.model.fields: appointment(ObjectId→Appointment,req), uploadedBy(patient|doctor,req), uploader(ObjectId→User,req), mediaType(image|video|audio,req), fileType(image/jpeg|image/png|image/webp|video/mp4|video/quicktime|audio/mpeg|audio/mp4,req), fileName(String,req), fileSize(Number bytes,req), url(String Cloudinary,req), publicId(String Cloudinary,req), duration(Number seconds,null), description(String)
constraints: Max 5 files per appointment (enforced in controller)

functions: bookAppointment — body:{slotId,patientNotes} — atomic slot lock → Appointment.create → populate → notifications
getDoctorAppointments — finds DoctorProfile by user, populates patient(name,email,phone,profileImage)
cancelAppointment — params:{id} body:{reason} — legacy cancel (being deprecated)
completeAppointment — params:{id} — doctor only, sets status=completed
server/src/controllers/appointment.contr.critical: Slot unlock on any failure after lock. Fee snapshot from DoctorProfile at creation time.

functions: verifyPayment — body:{razorpayOrderId,razorpayPaymentId,razorpaySignature,appointmentId} → HMAC verify → Payment+Appointment update → notifications
getMyPayments — patient payments with appointment+doctor populate
server/src/controllers/payment.controlle.critical: ADR-009: HMAC-SHA256 verified before any DB update. ADR-006: amount*100 for Razorpay API.

functions: createSlot — body:{date,startTime,endTime} — finds DoctorProfile by user
getMySlots — DoctorProfile by user → future slots sorted
updateSlot — params:{slotId} body:{startTime,endTime,isActive} — ownership check, !isBooked guard
onboard — delegates to doctorService.onboardDoctor(userId, body, files)
getMyProfile — findOne by user, populate user(name,phone,profileImage,email,role), auto-create if missing
updateMyProfile — body:{name,phone,...profileData} — User.findByIdAndUpdate for name/phone, PatientProfile.findOneAndUpdate for rest
uploadAvatar — req.file → upload → User.findByIdAndUpdate(profileImage) selecting name,phone,profileImage,email,role
searchDoctors — query:{q,page,limit,...filters} — full-text search, min 2 chars
getDoctorPublicProfile — params:{id} — delegates to doctorService, populates visible reviews
submitReview — body:{appointmentId,rating,comment} — appointment must be completed+owned, one per appointment, sets reviewSubmitted=true, notifies doctor
getDoctorReviews — params:{doctorId} — visible only, sorted desc
getMyReviews — patient's own reviews with doctor+appointment populate
toggleReviewVisibility — params:{id} — flips isVisible, recalculates DoctorProfile rating stats
suspendDoctor — params:{profileId} body:{reason} — only verified can be suspended
reconsiderDoctor — params:{profileId} → status back to pending
cancelAppointmentDoctor — params:{appointmentId} → finds DoctorProfile by user → refundService.initiateDoctorCancellation
uploadSessionDocument — params:{appointmentId} — PDF only, max 5MB, magic byte check, appointment must be completed, doctor ownership, Cloudinary upload, notifies patient
deleteSessionDocument — params:{appointmentId} — doctor ownership, Cloudinary delete
uploadAppointmentMedia — params:{appointmentId} — patient(confirmed status only) or doctor, max 5 files, Cloudinary, notifies other party
deleteAppointmentMedia — params:{mediaId} — uploader or doctor or admin
interpretSymptomsController — body:{symptoms} — min 5 chars, max 500 chars → aiService.interpretSymptoms
getDoctorAISummary — params:{doctorId} — verified only, returns cached aiSummary or generates
batchGenerateDoctorSummaries — admin only → aiService.batchGenerateSummaries, saves to DoctorProfile.aiSummary
joinWaitlist — params:{doctorId} — idempotent, creates if not exists
checkWaitlistStatus — params:{doctorId} — returns entry or null
getSuggestions — query:{q} — real-time autocomplete, verified doctors only

exports: forgotPassword({email}) — generates reset token, saves hashed to User, sends email
resetPassword({token,newPassword}) — validates token expiry, updates password
onboardDoctor(userId, profileData, files) — creates/updates DoctorProfile, uploads docs to Cloudinary
initiatePatientCancellation(appointmentId, patientId, reason) — sets appointment cancelled, payment refundStatus=requested, fire-and-forget email
initiateDoctorCancellation(appointmentId, doctorId) — cancels + auto-processes Razorpay refund immediately
approveRefund(paymentId, adminId, adminNote) — triggers Razorpay refund, updates payment+appointment
rejectRefund(paymentId, adminId, adminNote) — requires adminNote, sets refundStatus=rejected
server/src/services/refund.service.js.critical: Doctor cancellation bypasses admin approval. Patient cancellation requires admin approval.

server/src/services/emailService.js.critical: ADR-008: Never await in booking/payment/cancellation flows. Always fire-and-forget.

exports: getPlatformOverview() — total revenue, commission, appointments, users, doctors counts
interpretSymptoms(symptomsText) — GPT-3.5 symptom triage, returns specialization recommendations
batchGenerateSummaries(doctors) — sequential summary generation for array of doctors
uploadToCloudinary(localFilePath, folder) — uploads file, returns {url,publicId}, cleans up local tmp file
server/src/services/upload.service.js.critical: ADR-003: PDFs use resource_type:raw. Images use resource_type:auto.

exports: requireAuth — verifies Bearer JWT, DB checks user exists+isActive, attaches req.user{id,role,name,email}
server/src/middleware/auth.middleware.js.key_logic: Attaches plain object NOT Mongoose doc to req.user to prevent accidental hook triggers.

exports: requireRole(...allowedRoles) — factory, must run after requireAuth, checks req.user.role
uploadSingleImage(fieldName) — single image, 2MB limit, magic byte check
server/src/middleware/upload.middleware..key_logic: Magic byte verification: %PDF=application/pdf, 89504E47=PNG, FFD8FF=JPEG. Cleans up tmp files on failure.

server/src/middleware/error.middleware.j.key_logic: Handles: CastError(400), ValidationError(422), 11000 duplicate(409), JsonWebTokenError(401), TokenExpiredError(401), AppError.isOperational(statusCode), generic 500. Logs all errors.

server/src/utils/AppError.js.key_logic: class AppError extends Error. Sets statusCode, status(fail/error), isOperational=true. Caught by error.middleware.

server/src/utils/asyncHandler.js.key_logic: Wraps async fn: (req,res,next) => Promise.resolve(fn).catch(next). Eliminates try-catch boilerplate.

server/src/utils/constants.js.exports: ROLES{PATIENT,DOCTOR,ADMIN}, APPOINTMENT_STATUS, DOCTOR_STATUS, PAYMENT_STATUS, COMMISSION_RATE=0.10, TOKEN_EXPIRY=7d, PAGINATION{DEFAULT_PAGE,DEFAULT_LIMIT:10,MAX_LIMIT:50}, GEOSPATIAL{MAX_DISTANCE_METERS:50000,DEFAULT_DISTANCE_METERS:10000}

server/src/jobs/reminderJob.js.key_logic: Finds confirmed appointments for tomorrow (YYYY-MM-DD). Sends sendAppointmentReminder fire-and-forget per appointment. Skips if patient.email or doctor.user.name missing.

exports: expireStalePendingAppointments() — finds pending+unpaid appointments older than 15min, cancels+unlocks slot
server/src/jobs/expirePendingAppointment.key_logic: PENDING_TTL_MS=15min. Sets status=cancelled, cancelledBy=system, releases slot.isBooked=false.

client/src/components/admin/RevenueChart.key_logic: SVG bar chart. Tooltip on hover.

client/src/components/admin/AppointmentD.key_logic: SVG donut chart. Hover highlights segment.

client/src/components/admin/TopDoctorsTa.key_logic: navigate to /admin/doctors/:id on row click. Trophy icon for rank 1.

client/src/components/admin/RecentActivi.key_logic: Renders activity rows with Badge. Shows Skeleton while loading.

client/src/components/admin/PaymentsTabl.key_logic: Calls onRevenueAggregates with computed totals after filter. Client-side search+date+status filter.

client/src/components/ai/SymptomSearchBo.key_logic: Renders AIRecommendationCard on result. Calls onSpecializationFound with recommended specialization.

api_calls: getDiscoveryListingAPI, searchDoctorsAPI — on filter changes, 30s interval poll
client/src/components/ai/LiveDoctorMap.j.key_logic: Uses window.__theralignSelectDoctor global callback for map marker clicks. Leaflet/OpenStreetMap based. React.memo wrapped.

patient_profile_tabs._note: All 5 tab components share the same props pattern: {profile, formData, onChange, onSaveSuccess, onSaveDraft, completedSteps, onNext}
